next_steps: Discontinue or rapidly taper pulmonary vasodilators (epoprostenol) due to risk of precipitating pulmonary edema
Immediate evaluation for urgent bilateral lung transplantation
Genetic counseling and testing for EIF2AK4 mutations
Consider right ventricular mechanical circulatory support (e.g., Impella RP or ProtekDuo) as a bridge to transplant rather than traditional vasodilators
Avoid aggressive fluid resuscitation; maintain euvolemia with careful diuretic titration
Avoid invasive surgical lung biopsy due to extremely high mortality risk in the setting of severe pulmonary hypertension
